# HireMe-AI

> AI resume tailoring for specific companies. Free to try, no subscription.

## What this site does

HireMe-AI helps job seekers paste a resume, name a target company, and receive:
- A tailored resume rewrite
- ATS keywords
- Key improvements
- 10 interview questions

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.hireme-ai.com/
- FAQ (resume tailoring, ATS, interviews): https://www.hireme-ai.com/faq
- Resources (blog): https://www.hireme-ai.com/blog
- Privacy: https://www.hireme-ai.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.hireme-ai.com/terms

## Pricing

- 3 free uses without sign-up
- $1 per single use
- $20 credits pack (~$0.08 per use)
- No subscription

## Contact

contact@hireme-ai.com
